description: You are a robotics engineer at a warehouse automation company. Update the differential-drive AGV simulation in Webots to reflect the physical dynamics of the new off-center sorting conveyor module. For the CUSTOM_PAYLOAD Solid node, set the mass to 120.0 kg and the center of mass vector to 0.12 -0.05 0.18. Additionally, set the maxTorque for both the left_motor and right_motor to 80.0 Nm. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/agv_heavy_payload.wbt.
